name: Emmis Acquisition Corp.
business: Emmis Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed to effect a merger with one or more businesses. It has not selected any target and has no operating revenues. It intends to focus on businesses in North America and Southeast Asia, particularly in services, manufacturing, distribution, and technology sectors.

exposures.sentence: We intend to capitalize on the ability of our management team to identify, acquire and operate a business or businesses that can benefit from our management team’s established global relationships, sector expertise and active management, operating and capital market experiences, particularly as related to industrial and business services, manufacturing, transportation, and/or distribution and/or technology businesses.

We intend to capitalize on the ability of our management team to identify, acquire and operate a business or businesses that can benefit from our management team’s established global relationships, sector expertise and active management, operating and capital market experiences, particularly as related to industrial and business services, manufacturing, transportation, and/or distribution and/or technology businesses.

We intend to capitalize on the ability of our management team to identify, acquire and operate a business or businesses that can benefit from our management team’s established global relationships, sector expertise and active management, operating and capital market experiences, particularly as related to industrial and business services, manufacturing, transportation, and/or distribution and/or technology businesses.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: We have until the date that is 18 months from the closing of our IPO or until such earlier liquidation date as our board of directors may approve, to consummate our initial business combination.
